deploy.preDeployCommand: python manage.py migrate && python manage.py seed_test_users && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput
deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'python manage.py migrate && python manage.py seed_test_users && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput && gunicorn config.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-8080} --workers 2 --timeout 120'
